description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the uelen/archlinux-wayless:latest Docker image, caching the directories target/, cargo/ and xargo/. Define three stages: build, test, and run, and set CARGO_HOME and XARGO_HOME variables to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo and $CI_PROJECT_DIR/xargo respectively. In the build stage add a make job that runs rustc --version && cargo --version, exports PATH to include $CARGO_HOME/bin and ~/.cargo/bin, then executes make. In the test stage add a test job that exports the same PATH and runs make test. In the run stage add a run job that exports PATH, runs make, then runs timeout 80 make nographic | tee output || true, and finally executes bash -c '[ $(tail -n 20 output | grep -o "FIN") == "FIN" ] && echo "Successfully ran"'.
